User.title: User
User.description: A user of the Project Mana platform.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile photo.

createdAt.description: The time the user was created.

Gap.title: Gap
Gap.description: A record of a support gap in welfare services.

location.description: The location where the gap was observed.

actionType.description: The type of action or service that is missing.

experienceDescription.description: The detailed description of the user's experience.

legalityCategory.description: The AI-assessed legality category (illegal, legal, gray).

duration.description: How long the gap has persisted.

coping.description: How the person currently copes with the gap.

userId.description: The ID of the user who reported the gap.

createdAt.description: The time the record was created.

Report.title: Report
Report.description: A legal scrutiny report of an administrative inaction.

analysis.description: The legal analysis generated by AI.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created the report.

createdAt.description: The time the report was created.

News.title: News
News.description: A record of administrative misconduct or scandal.

date.description: The date of the news item.

title.description: The title of the news item.

content.description: The summary of the news content.

url.description: The URL to the full news article.

userId.description: The ID of the user who added this news (if applicable).

createdAt.description: The time the record was created.
